mapper.select: select * from aiw_role where role_code = #{roleCode} and is_deleted = 0
select * from aiw_role where is_deleted = 0 order by role_type desc, role_code asc
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_role (biz_id, role_code, role_name, description, role_type, status, version, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted, deleted_at) values (#{bizId}, #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{description}, #{roleType}, #{status}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{deleted}, #{deletedAt}) on duplicate key update role_name = values(role_name), description = values(description), status = values(status), version = values(version), updated_at = values(updated_at), updated_by = values(updated_by), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), deleted_at = values(deleted_at)
